value.found_quote:
## Subagent Lifecycle and States

Subagents run asynchronously in the background, allowing the parent agent to delegate a task and immediately resume its own work. At any point, a subagent exists in one of three states:
value.rationale: The page contains a section titled "Subagent Lifecycle and States" describing subagents running asynchronously in one of three states. The three named states—Running, Idle, and Killed—are each documented as numbered subsections, exactly matching the claim. The feature is described as a current capability with no deprecation or preview notice.
